title: ITU COP guidelines
detail: Continental and international baseline referenced in the brief.

title: AU COP Policy adopted
detail: The brief identifies the African Union Child Online Safety and Empowerment Policy as the key continental policy trigger.

title: Tanzania amendments and Ghana framework
detail: The brief groups Tanzania's amendments and Ghana's framework work inside the acceleration period.

title: Mali and Senegal DPA directives
detail: The brief uses these directives to show data protection authorities acting before dedicated COP laws exist.

title: Kenya guidelines and Zambia strategy
detail: The brief treats Kenya and Zambia as important 2025 implementation-stage examples.

title: Gabon ordinance and rights-risk warnings
detail: The brief uses Gabon and later rights-risk cases to show the next phase of the debate.
